title: Proclamation No. 1933, s. 1979
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1933

RESERVING FOR BAGONG LIPUNAN IMPROVEMENT OF SITES AND SERVICES (BLISS) SITE PURPOSES CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASTILLEJOS, PROVINCE OF ZAMBALES ISLAND OF LUZON UNDER THE ADMINISTRATION AND DISPOSITION OF THE MINISTRY OF HUMAN SETTLEMENTS.

By virtue of the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby reserve for Bagong Lipunan Improvement of Sites and Services (BLISS) site purposes under the administration and disposition of the Ministry of Human Settlements certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the Municipality of Castillejos, Province of Zambales, Island of Luzon, subject to private rights, if any there be, and more particularly described as follows:

TECHNICAL DESCRIPTION Lot No. 2876, Cad-322-D

“A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2876, Cad-322-D) situated in the Municipality of Castillejos, Province of Zambales, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the SW., W., & NW., along lines 1-2-3-4-5-6 by Lot 2553, Cad-322-D; along lines 6-7-8 by Lot 2552, Cad-322-D; along line 8-9 by Lot 2551, Cad-322-D; along line 9-10 by Lot 2550, Cad-322-D; Bearings true.

This lot was surveyed in accordance with law and existing regulations promulgated thereunder by Antonino Tañedo, Deputy Public Land Surveyor, from January 30 to October 30, 1968.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

DONE in the City of Manila, this 19th day of December, in the year of Our Lord, Nineteen Hundred and Seventy-Nine.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Assistant
